data.change_summary: Added optional `milestone_id` support to milestone task-run lineage, populated it on bead start/completion writes, backfilled and preserved it during lineage reads and `update_task_run` rewrites, and extended milestone-record tests to cover serialization, backward compatibility, legacy reads, bead queries, and outcome updates.

steps.description: Added optional `milestone_id` to `TaskRunEntry` with serde defaults so lineage entries stay backward-compatible with existing NDJSON.
Updated milestone task-run write and filesystem lineage paths so new start/completion records persist `milestone_id` and legacy entries retain or gain it during reads and outcome rewrites.
Extended milestone lineage tests for milestone ID serialization, legacy backfill behavior, bead-run query visibility, and update flow preservation, then ran the requested validation commands.
